name: de Young Museum

photo_credit.author: Fine Arts Museums of San Francisco (FAMSF)

summary_en: Archived documents concentrate on the rebuilding of the de Young Museum in Golden Gate Park: draft and revised environmental impact reports for the "New de Young Museum" (2000-2001), a 1997 economic-impact analysis and site-selection study for the M.H. de Young Memorial Museum, and Fine Arts Museums board minutes tracking the move from the old building to the new, plus a 1947 city appropriation ordinance listing the museum's budget. The museum is operated by the Fine Arts Museums (FAM), whose FY2025 budget line totaled $24M. The place file records no contracts naming it.
